steps.title: Spot the core requirement
steps.content: The goal asks to specify a LOCATION where Caspian terns stop. Specifying means naming a particular place, not describing general behavior.

steps.title: Find the choice that names the location
steps.content: The correct response names the exact location—the Great Salt Lake in northern Utah—where Caspian terns stop during migration. The other choices lack any location, while another response mentions only “salty waters” without the specific place name. This confirms D is correct.
